overviewH2: From bright, year-round sunrooms to precision cold storage.

advantages.title: Comfortable year-round
advantages.copy: The insulated core keeps sunrooms warm in winter and cool in summer — and holds cold rooms on temperature, from refrigeration through to deep freeze.

advantages.title: Airtight envelope
advantages.copy: The cam-lock joining system seals out drafts, dust and moisture — no cold bridges, no leaks, no air infiltration.

advantages.title: Finished in one step
advantages.copy: Pre-finished Colorbond skins are the wall, the insulation and the ceiling in a single panel — no lining, painting or extra trades.

advantages.title: Rapid assembly
advantages.copy: Modular panels install on site without specialist trades or equipment — a sunroom or a cool room goes up fast.

advantages.title: Built to last
advantages.copy: Hygienic, weather-tight steel skins wipe clean and stand up to the Australian climate for the life of the build.

heroLead: Steel-skinned insulated panels for sunrooms, enclosed outdoor living and controlled-temperature spaces alike. The same airtight, cam-locked, pre-finished panel that builds a cold room makes a beautiful, comfortable, year-round sunroom.
overviewPara1: Panelcore® steel-skinned insulated panels do far more than cold storage. The same high-performance panel that holds a freezer at -40°C makes an exceptionally comfortable sunroom — insulated walls and roof that stay warm in winter, cool in summer, and quiet in the rain.
overviewPara2: For sunrooms and enclosed outdoor living, Panelcore® turns a patio or verandah into a true year-round room. Pre-finished Colorbond skins mean no lining, no painting and no maintenance, while the insulated core keeps the space usable through every season — a finished ceiling and a weather-tight envelope in a single panel.
overviewPara3: The same system still excels at its original job: walk-in cool rooms, food processing, pharmaceutical and cold storage. The cam-lock joining system creates an airtight, seamless envelope, and modular panels install rapidly on site with no special tools or trades — whether you're building a sunroom or a freezer.
